Detailed Description
--------------------

This file declares interruptible sleep functions.

--------

- ``vlc_threads.h`` (:ref:`file_C__Users_ahumeaub_Desktop_CLionProject_TestAffichageSynchrone_include_LibVLC_include_vlc_plugins_vlc_threads.h`)
